message:
feat(data-pipeline): preserve segments + improve GenBank parsing

- build-db: keep multi-segment feature structure (store segments JSON in qualifiers) while still inserting per-segment rows so we do not imply coverage of gaps/introns.
- ncbi-fetcher: make GenBank parsing more robust and faster (O(N) sequence assembly via array join; relaxed 20+ indent for continuation lines; stricter accession-prefix stripping; include additional feature types beyond gene/CDS).
- tropism-build: treat hypothetical/uncharacterized proteins conservatively (skip non-fiber genes; require motif/strong evidence before emitting predictions).
